ksa_text: Skill in influencing organizational decision-makers and cross-functional stakeholders to adopt data-driven approaches, including framing technical value propositions in business terms, building consensus across competing priorities, and overcoming resistance through evidence rather than authority.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Leadership & Strategy falls outside the primary competency scope of the Data Platform Team Lead. This skill KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Leadership & Strategy truly out-of-scope for the Data Platform Team Lead? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Leadership & Strategy as a core or recommended competency for the Data Platform Team Lead. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Leadership & Strategy falls outside the established competency profile for the Data Platform Team Lead. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Leadership & Strategy is outside the competency scope of the Data Platform Team Lead. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
